title: Tax Calendar Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger tax calendar foundations judgment so accounting work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Tax Calendar Foundations is a leverage point inside accounting. It supports the broader goal of p&l, balance sheet, tax basics, and bookkeeping hygiene.
coreConcepts: Tax Calendar Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good tax calendar foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Tax Calendar Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
